M2100_CARE_TYPE_SRC_SPRVSN M2100 Care Management- Supervision and Safety This field indicates the level of caregiver ability and willingness to provide supervision and safety assistance. 00 = No assistance needed in this area
01 = Caregiver(s) currently provides assistance
02 = Caregiver(s) need training/supportive services to provide assistance
03 = Caregiver(s) not likely to provide assistance
04 = Unclear if
